title: Qlog QUIC Fixture Hydration Work Item
summary: Use the sibling qlog import package from the QUIC test project to hydrate recorded qlog fixtures back into the retained model.
planned_changes: Add requirement-homed QUIC tests that load recorded contained JSON and sequential JSON Text Sequences fixtures through the sibling importer, exercise the explicit contained CBOR path, and assert against hydrated retained-model objects and extension data. Keep replay execution out of scope and do not move parser dependencies into `Incursa.Qlog.Quic` production code.
out_of_scope: Any new runtime dependency from `Incursa.Qlog.Quic` production code to the importer package.
verification_plan: Run the QUIC fixture hydration tests, the sibling import package tests that cover explicit round-trips across the supported artifact shapes, and the repo qlog SpecTrace validation script.
